siem_detection_rules.name: iCagenda File Upload RCE Attempt
siem_detection_rules.description: Detects upload attempts targeting iCagenda Joomla extension file upload vulnerability (CVE-2026-48939)

detection_rule.snort: alert tcp any any -> any 80 (msg:"iCagenda File Upload RCE Attempt"; content:"icagenda"; nocase; content:".php"; content:"POST /"; sid:1000001; rev:1;)
detection_rule.suricata: alert http any any -> any any (msg:"iCagenda File Upload RCE Attempt"; content:"icagenda"; nocase; content:".php"; content:"POST /"; classtype:attempted-admin; sid:1000001; rev:1;)

siem_detection_rules.recommended_response: Block IP address, isolate affected systems, review logs for successful uploads

siem_detection_rules.name: Balbooa Forms File Upload RCE Attempt
siem_detection_rules.description: Detects upload attempts targeting Balbooa Forms Joomla extension file upload vulnerability (CVE-2026-56291)

detection_rule.snort: alert tcp any any -> any 80 (msg:"Balbooa Forms File Upload RCE Attempt"; content:"balbooa"; nocase; content:".php"; content:"POST /"; sid:1000002; rev:1;)
detection_rule.suricata: alert http any any -> any 80 (msg:"Balbooa Forms File Upload RCE Attempt"; content:"balbooa"; nocase; content:".php"; content:"POST /"; classtype:attempted-admin; sid:1000002; rev:1;)

siem_detection_rules.recommended_response: Block IP address, isolate affected systems, review logs for successful uploads

siem_detection_rules.name: JoomShaper SP Page Builder File Upload RCE Attempt
siem_detection_rules.description: Detects upload attempts targeting JoomShaper SP Page Builder Joomla extension file upload vulnerability (CVE-2026-48908)

detection_rule.snort: alert tcp any any -> any 80 (msg:"JoomShaper File Upload RCE Attempt"; content:"joomshaper"; nocase; content:".php"; content:"POST /"; sid:1000003; rev:1;)
detection_rule.suricata: alert http any any -> any 80 (msg:"JoomShaper File Upload RCE Attempt"; content:"joomshaper"; nocase; content:".php"; content:"POST /"; classtype:attempted-admin; sid:1000003; rev:1;)

siem_detection_rules.recommended_response: Block IP address, isolate affected systems, review logs for successful uploads

siem_detection_rules.name: Joomla Extension Upload Attack Pattern
siem_detection_rules.description: Generic detection for any Joomla extension file upload vulnerability exploitation attempt (CVE-2026-48939, CVE-2026-56291, CVE-2026-48908)

detection_rule.snort: alert tcp any any -> any 80 (msg:"Joomla Extension File Upload Attack"; content:"joomla"; nocase; content:".php"; content:"POST /"; sid:1000004; rev:1;)
detection_rule.suricata: alert http any any -> any 80 (msg:"Joomla Extension File Upload Attack"; content:"joomla"; nocase; content:".php"; content:"POST /"; classtype:attempted-admin; sid:1000004; rev:1;)

siem_detection_rules.recommended_response: Block IP address, patch all Joomla extensions, enable WAF rules

siem_detection_rules.name: Suspicious PHP File Upload (Any CMS)
siem_detection_rules.description: Generic detection for PHP file uploads which may indicate exploitation attempt

detection_rule.snort: alert tcp any any -> any 80 (msg:"Suspicious PHP File Upload"; content:".php"; content:"POST /"; sid:1000005; rev:1;)
detection_rule.suricata: alert http any any -> any 80 (msg:"Suspicious PHP File Upload"; content:".php"; content:"POST /"; classtype:attempted-admin; sid:1000005; rev:1;)

siem_detection_rules.recommended_response: Monitor for patterns, block if confirmed malicious, review upload validation

waf_rules.name: Block PHP Upload to Joomla Extensions
waf_rules.rule: SecRule REQUEST_URI "(?i)(icagenda|balbooa|joomshaper).*\.php" "id:900001,phase:2,deny,status:403,msg:'Blocked PHP upload to vulnerable Joomla extension'"
waf_rules.description: Blocks PHP file uploads to known vulnerable Joomla extensions

waf_rules.name: Block PHP File Extensions in Upload Paths
waf_rules.description: Blocks direct PHP uploads to upload directories

waf_rules.name: Validate Content-Type for File Uploads
waf_rules.rule: SecRule REQUEST_METHOD "POST" "@streq POST" "id:900003,phase:2,chain,deny,status:403,msg:'Invalid content type for file upload'" "t:lowercase" "SecRule REQUEST_HEADERS:Content-Type "(?i)^(text/|application/x-php|application/x-httpd-php)" "@rx .*" "t:none"
waf_rules.description: Blocks non-standard content types that could bypass file upload validation

deployment_instructions.elastic: Deploy rules to Elasticsearch detection rules, enable alerts to SIEM dashboard
deployment_instructions.snort: Add rules to /etc/snort/rules/local.rules and restart Snort service
deployment_instructions.suricata: Add rules to /etc/suricata/rules/local.rules and restart Suricata service
deployment_instructions.waf: Deploy rules to WAF configuration and test with curl against vulnerable endpoints

monitoring_recommendations.log_forwarding: Forward all web server logs to central SIEM with real-time correlation
monitoring_recommendations.alerting: Set up PagerDuty/Opsgenie alerts for critical severity detections
monitoring_recommendations.whitelisting: Implement allowlist for legitimate PHP files in upload directories
monitoring_recommendations.waf_rules: Deploy WAF rules before deploying to production to catch attacks at edge
monitoring_recommendations.regular_testing: Test detection rules weekly using controlled payloads
